Interface Properties.Independence.Activities

public interface interface Activities
Define las constantes que determinan es estado de un proveedor.

ALIVE
OUTOFORDER
UNKNOWN

ALIVE 
 public static final int ALIVE
OUTOFORDER 
 public static final int OUTOFORDER
UNKNOWN 
 public static final int UNKNOWN
